We cordially invite you to join us for the final presentations of the participating students as a part of International Summer Workshop 2025, Documentation and Design: Faros Tower, Buccoleon Palace and City Walls, on 30 June 2025 10:00 (İstanbul Local Time GMT+3) at Cibali Hall.

ORGANIZING TEAM:

Instructor, Asst. Prof. Dr. Zehra Irem Türksezer Sağır, Kadir Has University

Instructor, Assoc. Prof. Giorgio Verdiani, University of Florence

Tutor, Mert Okay, Kadir Has University

Tutor, Andrea Rosone, University of Florence

Prof. Dr. Füsun Alioglu, Kadir Has University (UNESCO Chair)
